scripts.build: bun run --filter '@rdx-lang/types' build && bun run --filter '@rdx-lang/core' build && bun run --filter '@rdx-lang/github' build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter '@rdx-lang/types' typecheck && bun run --filter '@rdx-lang/core' typecheck && bun run --filter '@rdx-lang/github' typecheck
